name: B&G Foods, Inc.
summary: B&G Foods manufactures, sells and distributes a diverse portfolio of branded, high-quality, shelf-stable and frozen food and household products across the United States, Canada and Puerto Rico. Key brands include Crisco, Clabber Girl, Bear Creek, Polaner, Underwood, B&G, Grandma's, New York Style, and B&M. The company complements branded retail sales with institutional, foodservice, and private label sales and has been in business for over 130 years.

products.name: Crisco
products.description: Brand of oils and shortening acquired from The J.M. Smucker Co. in December 2020.

products.name: Clabber Girl
products.description: Baking product brand included in the Specialty segment.

products.name: Bear Creek
products.description: Food brand included in the Specialty segment.

products.name: Polaner
products.description: Food brand included in the Specialty segment.

products.name: Underwood
products.description: Food brand included in the Specialty segment.

products.name: Green Giant
products.description: Frozen and shelf-stable vegetable brand, subject to multiple divestitures in U.S. and Canada.

products.name: College Inn
products.description: Broth and stock brand being acquired from Del Monte Foods Corporation II Inc.

products.name: Kitchen Basics
products.description: Broth and stock brand being acquired from Del Monte Foods Corporation II Inc.

products.name: Don Pepino
products.description: Brand of pizza and spaghetti sauces, crushed tomatoes, tomato puree and whole peeled tomatoes, divested May 2025.

products.name: Sclafani
products.description: Brand of pizza and spaghetti sauces, crushed tomatoes, tomato puree and whole peeled tomatoes, divested May 2025.

products.name: Back to Nature
products.description: Food brand divested to Barilla America in January 2023.

products.name: LeSueur
products.description: U.S. shelf-stable vegetable brand divested to McCall Farms, Inc. in August 2025.

products.name: New York Style
products.description: Food brand included in the Specialty segment.

products.description: Food brand included in the Specialty segment.
